title: Forgetful Payer — Immediate PTP Commitment
description: Customer forgot the EMI due date, cooperatively commits to paying within 2 days.
transcript:
ARIA: Hello, may I speak with Priya Nair? Hi Priya, this is ARIA from the bank. I'm calling about your home loan EMI of ₹22,000 which was due on the 10th and appears to have been missed. Is everything alright?

Customer: Oh no, really? I completely forgot! I've been travelling for work — I was supposed to set up an auto-debit but it never went through. I'm so sorry.

ARIA: No worries at all, Priya. These things happen. Would you be able to make the payment soon to avoid any late charges?

Customer: Yes, absolutely. I'll do it right now actually — let me pull up my banking app. Actually, can I do it tomorrow morning? I'll transfer ₹22,000 by 10 AM tomorrow. Is that okay?

ARIA: That's perfectly fine. I'll note your commitment to pay ₹22,000 by tomorrow 10 AM. We'll pause any follow-up messages until then. If you face any difficulty, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Customer: Great, thank you. I'll make sure it's done first thing tomorrow.

ARIA: Thank you, Priya. Have a good evening!
